name: core-components-monorepo
description: Enterprise Core Components Monorepo (Shared Logic + Dual Angular Playgrounds)

scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix packages/calendar && npm install --prefix packages/theme && npm install --prefix playground/angular && npm install --prefix playground/legacy-angular
scripts.start:all: start npm run start:angular && start npm run start:legacy && start npm run start:vanilla && start npm run start:portal
